detail: `./install-tools.sh --mcp` installed all 11 configured binaries. Its isolated `target/install-tools` build directory avoided Windows locks held by previously Cargo-launched servers. Both MCP configs validate as identical supported `servers` objects with direct commands. Installed `feedback-mcp` completed initialize and tools/list with feedback_ingest, feedback_inbox, feedback_query, feedback_mine, and feedback_summary.
